claim: YOLO demand evidence schema, prompt, readiness contract, and tests currently distinguish project, external, user, and unknown evidence scopes, and enforce that existing-project facts require project-scoped evidence with concrete locators, not external research.

evidence.summary: Evidence schema field definition states 'scope is project | external | user | unknown; project facts require project-scoped evidence'
evidence.why: Schema contract explicitly defines four valid scopes and project-locator requirements.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES set declares the four valid scope values
evidence.why: Implementation enforces exactly the four scope categories.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() and evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope() implement runtime scope classification and validation
evidence.why: Operational logic classifies and validates scope declarations.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() creates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE and PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blockers
evidence.why: Blocking logic enforces project-locator requirements at readiness time.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() creates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when scope is not declared
evidence.why: Explicit scope declaration is enforced for all evidence records.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt explicitly requires 'Every evidence record must include scope: project, external, user, or unknown' and 'Project facts require project-scoped evidence...with a repo-relative path'
evidence.why: Evidence agent instructions mandate scope and locator requirements.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot before/after and diffBoundarySnapshots detect any project file mutation
evidence.why: Runtime boundary audit prevents evidence agents from modifying target files.

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: '任何 existing-project factual claim 如果只有 external/user/unknown evidence，或 project evidence 没有具体项目定位符，都必须被 readiness blocker 拦住'
evidence.why: Product documentation confirms this is intentional design, not implementation gap.

evidence.summary: Test 'external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts' verifies PRD readiness is blocked with only external evidence
evidence.why: Test coverage confirms external evidence alone cannot prove project facts.

evidence.summary: Test 'project evidence requires a concrete project locator' verifies PRD readiness is blocked when project evidence lacks path
evidence.why: Test coverage confirms project evidence requires concrete locators.

evidence.summary: Test 'external URLs cannot be relabeled as project evidence' verifies PRD readiness is blocked when URLs are mislabeled as project scope
evidence.why: Test coverage prevents external evidence from being relabeled as project.

evidence.summary: Test 'evidence records must declare valid scope explicitly' verifies PRD readiness is blocked when scope is omitted
evidence.why: Test coverage enforces explicit scope declaration requirement.

risks: If claim is wrong, external web research could be misused as proof of target project state, leading to incorrect PRD assumptions and implementation failures.

result.notes: Independent verification confirms all explorer claims. Evidence schema (line 44, 52), scope classification logic (lines 382-412), blocking enforcement (lines 513-530, 438-447), agent prompts (lines 342-343), boundary audit (lines 640-646), doctrine documentation, and test coverage (lines 407-591) all properly implement the four-scope system with project-locator requirements. No conflicts found.
